title: cloud_gallery: green build, 100% coverage, aggressive lint, live deploy + mobile app install
objective: Make the cloud_gallery SPA production-ready and deployed: the Vite build must pass, the lint must be the most aggressive type-checked ruleset the toolchain supports, and vitest coverage must be a real 100% across statements/branches/functions/lines. Then deploy the SPA live via setup_cloud_gallery.sh, restore working ffmpeg so video posters generate, and whitelist + install the com.kuhy.dufs_client mobile app so focus mode does not kill it.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm build (tsc -b && vite build) succeeds — the prior TS2493/TS2352 tuple errors in dufs-client.test.ts are gone.
eslint config uses typescript-eslint strict + stylistic type-checked, react-hooks, and reportUnusedDisableDirectives=error; pnpm lint passes with zero errors.
pnpm coverage passes with thresholds set to 100/100/100/100 and reports 100% on all four metrics.
setup_cloud_gallery.sh deploys the SPA and dufs serves it with render-spa on 127.0.0.1:5000 (401 unauthenticated confirms it is up and auth-protected).
ffmpeg runs (stale /usr/local/bin shadow removed) and generate_thumbnails.sh produces video posters with 0 failures.
com.kuhy.dufs_client is in phone_focus_mode WHITELIST, the APK installs, launches, and survives the focus daemon.
out_of_scope: eslint-plugin-react (crashes under ESLint 10; TypeScript covers prop typing)
Changes to KeePass sync or media-sync scripts
Authenticated end-to-end browser walkthrough of the live URL (user does this at login)
verifier: pnpm build + pnpm lint + pnpm coverage (62 tests, 100% all metrics); setup_cloud_gallery.sh run + local dufs :5000 checks; generate_thumbnails.sh (10 made, 0 failed); adb install -r + monkey launch + pidof (RUNNING); documented in docs/superpowers/evidence/cloud-gallery-coverage-lint-deploy-2026-07-12.json
